creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port added.

I removed the post-install target, with the new pkg tools it's unecessary, since the port is packaged and then installed from the package, so pkg takes care of showing the message. With the post-install target the pkg-message would be shown twice, as it happens in the QA log you attached.

I also added NO_ARCH=yes, to mark this port has no architecture specific files, being just a perl script.

Thanks!
